CreatorSkills.title: Manage your skills
CreatorSkills.description: Create scanned private skills and use them from your connected MCP clients. They never appear in the public marketplace.
CreatorSkills.empty: You have not created a private skill yet.
CreatorSkills.contentHidden: Protected content is hidden from dashboard previews.

placeholders.title: My research workflow
placeholders.description: Explain what this skill helps your agent accomplish.
placeholders.content:
# My skill

Describe the workflow, constraints, and expected output...

CreatorSkills.securityDescription: Every submission passes identity verification, owner-only RLS, input normalization, static content scanning, immutable SHA-256 versioning, private visibility enforcement, and per-request MCP key authorization.
CreatorSkills.success: Your private skill is active and ready through MCP.
CreatorSkills.scanFailed: The skill did not pass the static scan. Review the checks below.
CreatorSkills.createFailed: The skill could not be created. Check that the slug is unique and the database migration has been applied.
CreatorSkills.invalidForm: Review the highlighted fields and try again.
CreatorSkills.mcpHint: Use list_purchased_skills in your MCP client to see private skills, then call get_skill_content with the skill ID.
